text:
--- Makefile.old	2010-05-30 23:58:03.000000000 +0300
+++ Makefile	2010-05-31 00:03:05.000000000 +0300
@@ -20,6 +20,7 @@
 CONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
 		LDFLAGS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
 .if !defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
